svg.title: dyld chained fixup: before and after load
svg.desc: Two-phase diagram showing how __got section slots contain Mach_fixup_ptr_64_bind structs before dyld runs, and real function pointers after dyld patches them. The LINKEDIT section provides the import name table dyld uses to resolve symbols.
svg.text: Your Forth code's ldr of a GOT slot gets the real address — no interpreter involved
